name: Majestic Absorption
name_jp: セイヴァー・アブソープション
desc:
Target 1 "Stardust Dragon", or 1 Synchro Monster that mentions it, that you control, then activate 1 of these effects;
● Equip 1 face-up monster your opponent controls to that target.
● It can attack directly this turn.
● This turn, each time it destroys an opponent's monster by battle, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the destroyed monster's original ATK.
You can only activate 1 "Majestic Absorption" per turn.
eff:
Target 1 "Stardust Dragon", or 1 Synchro Monster that mentions it, that you control, then activate 1 of these effects;
● Equip 1 face-up monster your opponent controls to that target.
● It can attack directly this turn.
● This turn, each time it destroys an opponent's monster by battle, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the destroyed monster's original ATK.
You can only activate 1 "Majestic Absorption" per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the opponent's field
Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
